title: CurseCraftSMP
description: this is my personal modpack that includes many things such as barrel roll and other cursed mods!
body:
Welcome to CurseCraft — the modpack for the delightfully unhinged.

Ever wanted to do a barrel roll in midair, build nether portals the size of your ego, or ride a creeper into the sunset? Now you can. CurseCraft is a chaotic mix of absurd mechanics, quality-of-life tweaks, and sheer nonsense — all packed into one weirdly functional experience.

Key features include:

Do a Barrel Roll: Midair flips and spins with your elytra, because style matters

Any-Size Nether Portals: Go beyond the frame — way beyond*

Ride Any Entity: If it has legs (or doesn’t), you can probably ride it

Visual Workbench: See what your friends are crafting — and "borrow" their ideas

Critter Armoury: Equip pigs, cows, chickens, cats, and dogs with their own armor — because why should only players get dressed up?

Ping Wheel: Communicate quickly and stylishly in multiplayer with a handy ping wheel

Built out of frustration, fueled by curiosity, and tested on a potato PC, CurseCraft embraces the cursed side of Minecraft modding.

⚠️ Warning: Sanity not included. Expect bugs, laughs, and the occasional flying pig.


⚠️ more warnings: if you have trouble with the game running properly (E.g. terrible frame rate, bad rendering etc), it is recommended that you increase your allocated RAM and use mellow shaders for a more playable experience.
if you don't like the way the blocks behave, try turning the Physics Mod off.

*if you want to use this feature, please install the mod from [curseforge]--(https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/any-size-portals)--. it is intended to be used with this modpack, but due to the way modrinth works, we cannot include it here. this is just how it works. we apologize for the inconvenience. PLEASE FOR THE LOVE OF GOD MAKE SURE YOU GET THE 1.21.4 VERSION*
